scenarios.prompt: Use agentic-code-review to review a small localized helper change with validation output.
Use agentic-code-review to review a permission-boundary change with tests but no rollback owner.
Use agentic-code-review to review a broad agent-authored diff with generated code, test rewrites, no decision log, and no validation output.
Use agentic-code-review to triage a batch containing one billing PR, one docs PR, and one generated mixed PR.
